markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the sales pipeline and align on a strategy to close deals for February.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Prioritize Feb Kickoffs:** The immediate goal is booking two kickoffs per week for February and March to meet forecasts and avoid a "dark mark" quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
  - [**Use Marcel as a Closer:** Marcel will now join 4+ prospect calls weekly to accelerate high-value deals (e.g., Vercel, 11 Labs, Greenhouse) and build relationships.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [**Adopt Flexible Pricing:** Use the $15k price point to close deals quickly, especially competitive ones. The $18k anchor can be reintroduced once the pipeline is full.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [**Fix Pipeline Hygiene:** Implement a strict "close lost" cadence (e.g., for deals inactive \>2 months) to fix unusable metrics that inflate deal cycles and distort win rates.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2680.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Health & Forecasting

  - [**Problem:** The pipeline is inflated with \~55 deals, making it unmanageable and distorting key metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Impact:** Inaccurate data (win rate, deal cycle) makes forecasting and board reporting impossible.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2680.0)
      - [**Example:** A 70% win rate reported in Q3 was a statistical anomaly caused by not closing lost deals.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2696.0)
      - [**Consequence:** This prevents accurate pipeline coverage planning (e.g., 3x vs. 4x), which represents a $30M difference in required pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2737.0)
  - [**Solution:** Implement a strict "close lost" cadence for inactive deals.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2792.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This cleans the data and allows the sales team to focus on active opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2686.0)
      - [**Safeguard:** Accounts will be protected for 6 months post-close-lost to prevent poaching.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)

### February Kickoff Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Secure two kickoffs per week for February and March.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
  - [**Feb 9th Candidates:**](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [**Spendesk:** Legal redlines are minor; close is imminent.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [**JAMA:** Stalled on legal terms (liability cap).](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [**Otter:** Unresponsive; Marcel to re-engage via a CMO community contact.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**Feb 16th Candidates:**](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [**Assort Health:** Ready to sign; verbal agreement secured.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [**Vercel:** Top priority. A competitive win against AeroOps, driven by a strong relationship with the CMO.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
          - [**Context:** The CMO previously fired the same agency at Redis to hire us.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
          - [**Opportunity:** High-value programmatic work on a world-class site, with CEO attention.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [**RunLayer:** Low priority due to a difficult contact and a poor renewal experience with a similar client (Interwell).](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)

### Pricing & Negotiation Tactics

  - [**Strategy:** Use the $15k price point to close deals quickly, especially competitive ones.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Prioritize securing kickoffs to meet forecasts and build momentum. Upsells can be pursued later.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Key Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2443.0)
      - [**Urgency:** Create a "fear of missing out" by stating only one slot is available.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2464.0)
      - [**VC Funding:** Explain that VC funding allows us to offer premium talent at a lower price, which helps justify the value.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2474.0)
      - [**Social Proof:** Name-drop high-profile prospects (e.g., "Vercel is in the process of signing") to build credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2443.0)

### Leveraging Marcel & New Hire Andy

  - [**Marcel's Role:**](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [**Cadence:** Book 4+ prospect calls on Marcel's calendar every Wednesday afternoon.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Marcel's involvement accelerates deals, builds relationships, and validates the product roadmap by testing new messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
      - [**Communication:** Use Slack channels for all prospects to enable faster, more direct communication.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**Andy's Role:**](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [**Background:** New hire with 7 years at Google Cloud negotiating major contracts.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Function:** Assist Tyler with procurement and legal redlines to free up his time for sales activities.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [**Systematization:** Help formalize our decision criteria for legal/procurement issues.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Check That Product Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Develop a Check That offering to capture leads not ready for a full sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [**Proposed Offering:** A $30k package for 18 months.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [**Scope:** Includes the first two weeks of sprint work (strategy, context files, kickoff) but excludes the time-intensive editorial calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This creates a lower-effort, high-value entry point for prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [**Sales Ownership:** Marcel is the primary AE for Check That. Tyler will bring Marcel in for interested prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
      - [Secure two kickoffs per week for February and March, using the $15k price point as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
      - [Book 4+ prospect calls on Marcel's calendar every Wednesday afternoon.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [Create Slack channels for all new prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
      - [Implement a bi-weekly "close lost" session for deals inactive \>2 months.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2792.0)
  - [**Bridget:**](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [Onboard Andy to assist Tyler with legal and procurement negotiations.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)
      - [Lead sales for the new Check That offering.](https://fathom.video/share/yMGR1yyT8PE32pczcop9Nvg-xJ6PkBmR?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)
